notes: Seems like the game uses some incompatable video codec. Animated menu background is missing as well as end video. Outside of that game play works fine.
title: City of Brass

notes: Doesn't launch at all. No tweaks seem to fix this.
title: City of Brass

notes:
Playing Epic Store free version, game is missing some libraries to work. What you need to do is install Epic Store through lutris using lutris website script. Then install City of Brass through the Epic Store and then apply this fix in the wineprefix 

https://drive.google.com/file/d/1IajQcm5FyokCIQKSeXM07JACQLO9k-7A/view

as seen at this Shadows Awakening video (same problem)

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=B_OlCMvWfEE 

Remember to change the script last two lines according to where your wineprefix is located. The game itself runs perfectly after that (1 hour test), performance is less than Win$.
title: City of Brass
